reviews.comment:
Siempre tienen combustible a pesar de la escasez, es algo concurrido por vehículos y también el shop las 24 hs. Tiene estacionamiento y buenos baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
They always have fuel despite the shortage. It's quite busy with vehicles, and the shop is open 24 hours a day. It has parking and good, clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The price of fuel is excessive. It's not the official YPF price.

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio YPF - ACA se encuentra ubicada en la localidad de Villa Ojo de Agua,  provincia de Santiago Del Estero. Muy buena la atención del personal. Tiene servicompras. Los baños son impecables. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF-ACA service station is located in Villa Ojo de Agua, Santiago del Estero province. The staff is very attentive. It has a convenience store. The restrooms are spotless. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPNmJiZXBBRRAB
